heading: Run Queries on the Converted Fields
body:
You can run queries against the numeric and date fields that were
converted to strings. This tutorial uses [queryString](querystring-ref) and
[autocomplete](autocomplete-ref) operators to search for properties. The query
uses the following pipeline stages:

- [$search](pipe.$search) stage to search the collection

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage to limit the output to `5` results

- [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to exclude `_id`

In this section, you connect to your cluster and run
the sample queries using the operator against the fields in the
`airbnb_mat_view` collection.

> **Note:** You can't run [near](near-ref) or [range](range-ref) queries against
> the date and number fields that were converted to strings in your
> materialized view.

AND Query

OR Query
